message:
feat(rch): Add local capability probing and version mismatch detection

Implements intelligent local-vs-remote capability comparison to warn users
when their local toolchain versions differ significantly from remote workers.
This helps catch potential compatibility issues before remote compilation.

Key additions:
- Add probe_local_capabilities() to detect local rustc, bun, node, npm versions
- Implement version parsing utilities (extract_version_numbers, major_version)
- Add rust_version_mismatch() for Rust minor version comparison
- Add major_version_mismatch() for Node/Bun major version comparison
- Implement collect_local_capability_warnings() aggregating all mismatches
- Add runtime_label() and has_any_capabilities() helper functions

The system now warns when local Rust differs by minor version or when
Node/Bun differs by major version from available remote workers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
